notes: MIL-DTL-46100 Class 1 high-hardness armor steel. 477-534 BHN range. RHAe ~1.25-1.35 per mm vs AP per ARL-TR-4632 (Showalter). Used in applique armor kits and vehicle hulls. Weldability requires preheat and controlled HAZ.

source.methodology: RHAe from ARL-TR-4632 ballistic test data for Class 1 HHA. Hardness range per MIL-DTL-46100. Density 7.85 g/cm³ per standard armor steel.
